Services Products Team Clients Contact Us

Offensive Cybersecurity

for everyone, because the best defense is a good offense!

Freelabz secures your digital assets through expert audits and precise penetration testing, and guides you through your Cloud transition and DevOps processes. We also develop tools and products for everyone to contribute to the growth of offensive cybersecurity.




Discover our services Explore our products

Our services

External attack surface audit

Comprehensive identification of your exposed assets (subdomains, services, websites), OSINT and initial vulnerability analysis for a complete view of your exposure.

Request a quote

Code audit (SAST/DAST)

Static, dynamic and AI-assisted analysis of your source code to detect security vulnerabilities early. CI/CD integration option available.

Request a quote

Application audit (web/mobile)

In-depth security assessment of your web (API, routes, fuzzing) and mobile (traffic interception) applications in blackbox or whitebox modes.

Request a quote

Penetration testing (pentest)

Simulation of real attacks to assess your systems' resilience, identify intrusion paths and test the effectiveness of your security controls.

Request a quote

Phishing

Phishing simulation to assess your employees' resistance to social engineering.

Request a quote

Proactive annual subscription

Initial pentest (a few days), followed by customizable monthly scans, monitoring and remediation management. Optional: access to Secator Cloud.

Request a quote

DevOps consulting

Setup and optimization of CI/CD pipelines, integration of security into deployment processes (DevSecOps), automation and best practices for fast and secure releases.

Request a quote

Cloud consulting

Preparation, cloud selection, architecture, setup and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Ansible). End-to-end guidance with a security focus at every step.

Request a quote

Training

Practical training in cybersecurity, DevOps, programming (Python, Go) and Linux & network administration. Adapted to all levels, from beginner to expert.

Request a quote

Our tools and products

Beyond services, Freelabz innovates by creating tools for the community and businesses, making offensive security more efficient and accessible.

Secator (open-source CLI)

Automated pentest tool designed for pentesters. Simplifies tool launching and automation of repetitive workflows (reconnaissance, scanning) via configurable YAML files.

View on GitHub

Secator Cloud (SaaS platform)

Configurable offensive security platform. Allows companies to launch custom scans and pentesters to manage missions, analyze data (via AI) and generate reports. Self-hosted option available.

Discover the platform

Our team of experts

Olivier Cervello

Pentester & developer

My professional and academic background is marked by a strong commitment to technology and computing, with a Master of Science in Computer Engineering from the Illinois Institute of Technology and 4 years at Google as a Cloud engineer. I have developed advanced technical skills in cybersecurity, DevOps and Cloud infrastructure, and I aim to contribute to securing critical infrastructure and promoting responsible use of technology.

Wally Chaibi

Pentester & system administrator

My career started in catering and entertainment before moving into IT and digital security through self-taught learning and additional qualifications (DAEU, Networks and Telecommunications DUT, professional certification). I then worked as a systems and network administrator to protect sensitive data and ensure the integrity of computer systems.

They trust us

Contact our experts to discuss your audit, pentest needs or to learn more about our Secator and Secator Cloud tools.
